reasoning: The Lean signature matches the informal statement on all components: p.Prime corresponds to "p is prime", α > 0 corresponds to "α ∈ ℤ⁺", card G = p^α corresponds to "order p^α", and the universally quantified statement ∀ H : Subgroup G, H.index = p → H.Normal faithfully encodes "every subgroup of index p is normal". The Fintype G instance is justified by the finite order condition (G being a group of order p^α is inherently finite). The quantifier structure, types (ℕ for α is fine since it's positive), and conclusion all correctly mirror the mathematical claim without adding or dropping hypotheses.
